title: StatDef
description: A stat declared in data (plan/02 §1). The Key is the identifier formulas use (Str, HP); the def id (stat_str) is what other defs reference. Convention: IDs in structural fields, keys in formula strings.

description.description: One line for humans and LLMs (surfaced by the manifest).

inherits.description: Parent def ID (same kind); objects deep-merge, scalars override, arrays replace or take {"$append"/"$remove"} patches.

key.description: Formula identifier for this stat. Must be unique across stats.

min.description: Lower clamp formula (evaluated against the owning entity). Null = unclamped.

default.description: Default base value: a formula, or the keywords "min" / "max".

formula.description: Derived stat: computed from this formula instead of a stored base value.

vital.description: When true, an entity whose current value reaches the stat's minimum dies.
